trade.summary: Significant bilateral trade relationship. The Regno Unito exports machinery, vehicles, and financial services to Polonia. Polonia exports furniture, machinery, and agri-food to the Regno Unito. The large Polish community in the Regno Unito (~1 million people) creates substantial remittance and services trade flows. Post-Brexit, some trade shifted but overall volumes remain robust.
disputes: post-Brexit settlement rights for Polish citizens in Regno Unito

diplomatic.summary: The Regno Unito and Polonia have developed one of the closest bilateral relationships in Europe. Both are strongly committed to Ucraina's defence. Polonia's massive defence buildup aligns with Regno Unito security priorities. The Regno Unito-Polonia Enhanced Defence and Security Cooperation Agreement (2023) elevated the partnership. Large Polish diaspora in Regno Unito creates people-to-people ties.
recent_incidents: Polish citizens' Brexit settlement scheme processing issues

military.summary: Very strong military relationship. Both NATO members with deeply aligned threat assessments on Russia. Regno Unito troops deployed in Polonia as part of NATO enhanced forward presence. Regno Unito has supplied Ucraina with military aid coordinated with Polonia. Regno Unito and Polonia are co-leaders in NATO's eastern flank reinforcement. Regno Unito support for Polonia's defence buildup is significant.

financial.summary: Regno Unito investment in Polonia is significant across financial services, retail, and manufacturing. Regno Unito banks are active in Polish markets. Large Polish diaspora in Regno Unito creates substantial remittance flows to Polonia. Polish companies have growing Regno Unito presence in construction and manufacturing.

energy.summary: Regno Unito and Polonia are cooperating on energy security within NATO frameworks. Regno Unito supports Polonia's nuclear energy plans. Regno Unito expertise in offshore wind relevant to Baltic Sea development. Limited direct bilateral energy trade.

scientific.summary: Strong scientific ties. Large Polish academic community in Regno Unito universities. Joint research through bilateral agreements. Polish mathematicians and physicists well-represented in Regno Unito academia. Regno Unito-Polonia cooperation in AI, cybersecurity, and advanced manufacturing growing.
